items.name: Agones
items.description: Agones is a library for hosting, running, and scaling dedicated game servers on Kubernetes.

items.name: Amazon Elastic Container Service (ECS)
items.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) is a highly scalable, high-performance container orchestration service that supports Docker containers and allows you to easily run and scale containerized applications on AWS.

items.name: Backend.AI
items.description: Backend.AI transforms GPU complexity into operational simplicity. Our container-level GPU virtualization maximizes performance while minimizing costs. The platform supports the entire AI lifecycle from data analysis to training and inference, streamlining AI development for businesses of all scales.

items.name: Capsule
items.description: Capsule implements a multi-tenant and policy-based environment in your Kubernetes cluster. It is designed as a micro-services-based ecosystem with the minimalist approach, leveraging only on upstream Kubernetes.

items.name: China Mobile Cloud CNP
items.description: China Mobile Cloud CNP is an application management platform for multi-cluster and multi-cloud scenarios.

items.name: China Mobile Panji PaaS Platform
items.description: China Mobile Panji PaaS Platform is an open, standard and self-controlled cloud native technical base. Using containerization technology, it provides core capabilities including enterprise-level application service management, elastic scalability, unified governance of heterogeneous microservice framework, and panoramic cloud native observation, etc.

items.name: CoHDI
items.description: Enables dynamic device scaling using Composable Hardware Disaggregated Infrastructure (CoHDI). CoHDI is a community-driven, standards-based open ecosystem for next-generation architectures and frameworks built on Composable Hardware Disaggregated Infrastructure. The objective is to bridge the gap between Kubernetes and CoHDI by collaborating with the Dynamic Resource Allocation, Autoscaler, and Scheduler projects. This enables data center operators to realize the benefits of cost efficiency, high availability, and sustainability through a disaggregated computing system.

items.name: Clusternet
items.description: [CNCF Sandbox Project] Managing your Kubernetes clusters (including public, private, edge, etc.) as easily as visiting the Internet

items.name: Clusterpedia
items.description: Clusterpedia is used for complex resources search across multiple clusters, support simultaneous search of a single kind of resource  or multiple kinds of resources existing in multiple clusters.

items.name: Cozystack
items.description: Cozystack is a free PaaS platform and framework for building private clouds and providing users/customers with managed Kubernetes,  KubeVirt-based VMs, databases as a service, NATS, message brokers, etc. with GPU support in VMs and Kubernetes clusters.

items.name: Crossplane
items.description: Crossplane is the cloud native control plane framework that allows you to build control planes without needing to write code. Crossplane has a highly extensible backend that enables you to orchestrate applications and infrastructure no matter where they run and a highly configurable frontend that lets you define the declarative API it offers.

items.name: Eraser
items.description: Eraser uses vulnerability data to remove non-running images from all Kubernetes nodes in a cluster.

items.name: Fluid
items.description: Fluid is an orchestration platform for elastic data abstraction and acceleration in cloud native environment.

items.name: hami
items.description: Heterogeneous AI Computing Virtualization Middleware

items.name: iSSCloud
items.description: iSoftStone Multi-cloud Management System is an enterprise-level cloud management platform applied in multiple public  clouds and public-private hybrid cloud scenarios. It provides consistent self-service and operation management capabilities  on heterogeneous resources which include centralized resource management and control, automated resource delivery, intelligent  operation analysis and O&M management to reduce the costs of hybrid cloud management.

items.name: Kestra
items.description: Scalable, event-driven, language-agnostic orchestration and scheduling platform to manage millions of workflows declaratively in code.

items.name: KAI Scheduler
items.description: KAI Scheduler is a robust, efficient, and scalable Kubernetes scheduler that optimizes GPU resource allocation for AI workloads in large-scale clusters.

items.name: Knative
items.description: Knative is a developer-focused serverless application layer which is a great complement to the existing Kubernetes application constructs. Knative consists of three components: an HTTP-triggered autoscaling container runtime called “Knative Serving”, a CloudEvents-over-HTTP asynchronous routing layer called “Knative Eventing”, and a developer-focused function framework which leverages the Serving and Eventing components, called "Knative Functions".

items.name: Koordinator
items.description: QoS based scheduling system for hybrid orchestration workloads on Kubernetes, bringing workloads the best layout and status.

items.name: kube-green
items.description: kube-green is a simple k8s addon that automatically shuts down (some of) your resources when you don't need them.

items.name: kube-rs
items.description: kube-rs is the core Rust ecosystem for building applications against Kubernetes

items.name: KubeAdmiral
items.description: KubeAdmiral is a multi-cluster scheduling and orchestration system for Kubernetes.

items.name: Godel-Scheduler
items.description: Godel-Scheduler is a unified scheduler for both online and offline tasks.

items.name: Kubeflow
items.description: Kubeflow is the foundation of tools for AI Platforms on Kubernetes.

items.name: KubeFleet
items.description: A multi-cluster solution that enables users to effectively manage their applications running in multiple Kubernetes clusters.

items.name: Kubernetes
items.description: Kubernetes is an open-source system for automating deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications

items.name: Kured
items.description: Kured (KUbernetes REboot Daemon) is a Kubernetes daemonset that performs safe automatic node reboots when the need to do so is indicated by the package management system of the underlying OS

items.name: Slurm
items.description: Slurm is an open source, fault-tolerant, and highly scalable cluster management and job scheduling system for large and small Linux clusters.

items.name: OpenSandbox
items.description: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

items.name: SuperPlane
items.description: Open source DevOps control plane for event-driven workflows.

items.name: Katalyst
items.description: Katalyst is a QoS-based resource management system for workload colocation on kubernetes

items.name: AWS Cloud Map
items.description: AWS Cloud Map is a cloud resource discovery service. With Cloud Map, you can define custom names for your application resources, and it maintains the updated location of these dynamically changing resources. This increases your application availability because your web service always discovers the most up-to-date locations of its resources.

items.name: Oxia
items.description: Oxia is a scalable metadata store and coordination system

items.name: Xline
items.description: Xline is a high-performance geo-distributed metadata management system, which is compatible with the ETCD interface.

items.name: CloudWeGo
items.description: CloudWeGo is ByteDance's open source Golang-centric middleware that can be used to quickly build enterprise-class cloud native architectures.

items.name: Easy-Ngo
items.description: easy-ngo is a fast, out-of-the-box microservice development framework based on the Go language.

items.name: go-zero
items.description: go-zero is a web and rpc framework written in Go. It's born to ensure the stability of the busy sites with resilient design. Builtin goctl greatly improves the development productivity.

items.name: gRPC
items.description: A high performance, open source universal RPC framework.

items.name: Connect RPC
items.description: Connect is a family of libraries for building browser and gRPC-compatible HTTP APIs.

items.name: kratos
items.description: Kratos is a microservice-oriented governance framework implements by golang, which offers convenient capabilities to help you quickly build a bulletproof application from scratch.

items.name: SRPC
items.description: High performance, low latency, lightweight enterprise-level RPC system, which supports Baidu bRPC, Tencent tRPC, thrift protocols.

items.name: TARS
items.description: TARS is a high-performance RPC framework that provides an integrated solution of microservice governance.

items.name: Avi Networks
items.description: Avi Networks drives automation and intelligence across multi-cloud environments with intent-based application services, including LB and WAF

items.name: BFE
items.description: Open-source layer 7 load balancer derived from proprietary Baidu FrontEnd

items.name: BunkerWeb
items.description: BunkerWeb is a next-generation, open-source Web Application Firewall (WAF/WAAP), reverse proxy, ingress controller, and API gateway controller.

items.name: Caddy
items.description: Caddy is a powerful, enterprise-ready, open source web server with automatic HTTPS written in Go

items.name: Citrix ADC (formerly NetScaler ADC)
items.description: Citrix ADC is an application delivery and load balancing solution that provides a high-quality user experience for your web, traditional, and cloud-native applications regardless of where they are hosted.

items.name: LoxiLB
items.description: eBPF based cloud-native load-balancer. Powering Kubernetes|Edge|5G|IoT|XaaS Apps.

items.name: Pipy
items.description: Pipy is a programmable proxy for the cloud, edge and IoT. It's written in C++, which makes it extremely lightweight and fast. It's also fully programmable by using PipyJS, a tailored version from the standard JavaScript language.

items.name: Sangfor CNAD
items.description: Sangfor CNAD is a cloud native application proxy, that provides layer7&layer4 load balance service, high performance TLS encryption and decryption resource pool, and Ingress&Loadbalancer for kubernetes.

items.name: Azure API Management
items.description: Azure API Management is a hybrid, multi-cloud API, full lifecycle management platform for APIs across all environments. It allows customers to self-host API gateways as containers on Kubernetes.

items.name: Envoy Gateway
items.description: Part of the Envoy project, Envoy Gateway is the control plane for dynamically managing Envoy Proxy, aimed at significantly decreasing the barrier to entry when using it for Gateway (sometimes known as "north-south") use cases.

items.name: Kgateway
items.description: An Envoy-powered, Kubernetes-native API Gateway that integrates Kubernetes Gateway API with a control plane for API connectivity in any cloud environment.

items.name: Kuadrant
items.description: Kuadrant combines Gateway API and Istio-based gateway controllers to enhance application connectivity. It enables platform engineers  and application developers to easily connect, secure, and protect their services and infrastructure across multiple clusters  with policies for TLS, DNS, application authentication & authorization, and rate limiting.

items.name: Kusk Gateway
items.description: Kusk Gateway is a self-service API gateway powered by OpenAPI and Envoy. Kusk Gateway is built and maintained by Kubeshop.

items.name: Lunar.dev
items.description: Lunar.dev’s mission is to enable optimization and control of  third-party API consumption in production environments. Lunar is a lightweight tool that empowers DevOps and engineering teams  to centralize consumption, gain insight and visibility into usage patterns and costs, and utilize out-of-the-box policies.

items.name: ngrok
items.description: ngrok is a unified ingress platform that combines your firewall, API gateway and global load balancing into a versatile production service. Loved by over 6 million developers, you can deliver and monitor apps from any cloud, datacenter or your home network.

items.name: Aeraki Mesh
items.description: Aeraki Mesh allows you to manage any layer-7 traffic in a service mesh

items.name: AWS App Mesh
items.description: AWS App Mesh is a service mesh that provides application-level networking to make it easy for your services to communicate with each other across multiple types of compute infrastructure. App Mesh standardizes how your services communicate, giving you end-to-end visibility and ensuring high-availability for your applications.

items.name: Flomesh Service Mesh (FSM)
items.description: Lightweight SMI compatible service mesh for Kubernetes east-west and north-south traffic management, uses ebpf for layer4 and pipy proxy for layer7 traffic management, support multi cluster network.

items.name: Glasnostic
items.description: Glasnostic makes modern cloud applications resilient by shaping how systems interact, automatically and in real-time.

items.name: Istio
items.description: Simplify observability, traffic management, security, and policy with the Istio service mesh.

items.name: Kmesh
items.description: Kmesh is a high-performance and low overhead service mesh data plane based on eBPF and programmable kernel. Kmesh brings traffic management, security and monitoring to service communication without needing application code changes. It is natively sidecarless, zero intrusion and without adding any resource cost to application container.

items.name: Linkerd
items.description: Ultra light, ultra simple, ultra powerful. Linkerd adds security, observability, and reliability to Kubernetes, without the complexity.

items.name: Merbridge
items.description: Use eBPF to speed up your Service Mesh like crossing an Einstein-Rosen Bridge.

items.name: Sermant
items.description: Sermant a proxyless service mesh solution based on Javaagent.

items.name: Tetrate Service Bridge (TSB)
items.description: Application connectivity platform.
